title: Dhunga — Space, Held Quietly
prompt: A portfolio for Dhunga, a two-person architecture studio in Patan working in brick, stone, and light. Serious, spatial, quietly confident. Projects are the heroes.

direction.name: Measured Thresholds
direction.thesis: A measured architectural folio where brick-toned project plates emerge like rooms encountered in sequence—precise, tactile, and nearly silent.
direction.signature: Project images open through opposing clipped planes as the visitor scrolls, while a fixed drawing index advances through the work.
